About Me

Obsessed with AI
that actually ships

I'm an AI/ML developer from Anand, Gujarat, studying B.Tech Information Technology at ADIT, CVM University. My goal is to make intelligent systems that are not just smart — but fast, practical, and actually useful.

My path into AI started with a simple question: can I replace my mouse with just my hand? That one project opened everything. Since then I've built gesture systems, NLP tools, demand forecasting models, and more.

I believe the best AI work closes the gap between research and the real world — clean code, real impact, no unnecessary complexity.

Build AI that solves real problems for real people
Close the gap between ML research and production
Contribute to AI safety and alignment over time

"The best model isn't the most accurate one — it's the one accurate and fast enough to actually ship."

Projects

Things I've built
and shipped

Computer Vision2024

Gesture Mouse Control

Replaced a physical mouse with hand gestures running at 28–35 FPS. The system tracks 21 hand landmarks through your webcam and maps them to real OS cursor events — move, left click, right click, scroll. No extra hardware needed.

MediaPipeOpenCVPyAutoGUIctypesPython
View on GitHub 28–35 FPS · Real-time · No extra hardware
Computer Vision2024

Smart Volume Control V3

Controls your system volume using the distance between your thumb and index finger — tracked live at 29–35 FPS. A visual bar on screen gives instant feedback. This is the third version, with much better speed than V1 and V2.

OpenCVMediaPipePycawNumPyPython
View on GitHub 29–35 FPS · Euclidean distance mapping
NLP · AI2025

RecruitAI — Resume Screening System

An AI tool that reads resumes, scores them against a job description, and gives you a ranked list of candidates automatically. Uses TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity to match skills. Includes a clean Streamlit dashboard with hiring pipeline view and candidate profiles.

NLPspaCyTF-IDFCosine SimilarityStreamlitScikit-learnFAISS
View on GitHub Hiring pipeline · Candidate ranking · Skill matching
Machine Learning2025In Progress

DemandX — Ride Demand Forecasting

Predicts hourly ride demand using XGBoost and Random Forest with time-series data. Finds demand hotspots through location clustering and shows the results on interactive maps. Built for optimizing how ride services place their drivers.

XGBoostRandom ForestMiniBatchKMeansFoliumPandasseaborn
View on GitHub Time-series forecasting · Geospatial clustering

How I got

2023

Started B.Tech IT at ADIT

CVM University · Anand · CGPA 8.28

Early 2024

First CV Projects

OpenCV · MediaPipe

Built Smart Volume Control V1, V2, V3. Learned the hard lessons about real-time performance and FPS.

September 2024

Smart India Hackathon 2024

ADIT · Evaluated by TCS & Godrej

Competed at SIH-2024. My first major national-level AI competition.

CV + ctypes

Built a complete mouse replacement — taking ML inference all the way to OS-level hardware control.

What I'm
building next

Active areas where I'm studying, experimenting, and building — the most interesting AI challenges right now.
🤖

Large Language Models

Learning how LLMs actually work inside — attention, KV caching, context windows. Going beyond just using APIs.

Active
🔍

RAG Systems

Building retrieval-augmented generation — connecting LLMs to real knowledge with FAISS, LangChain, and vector stores.

Active
🕸️

Agentic AI

AI that plans and executes multi-step tasks — not just responds. Exploring tool use and reasoning chains.

Experimenting
🎯

Fine-Tuning & MLOps

LoRA and QLoRA for adapting models to specific domains, plus building the infrastructure to deploy and monitor them.
